ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Age group of the customer (e.g., 0-17, 18-24) */,
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Occupation of the customer */,
  "city_category" TEXT /* Category of the city where the customer resides (e.g., A, B, C) */,
  "stay_in_current_city_years" TEXT /* Number of years the customer has stayed in the current city */,
  "marital_status_id" INTEGER /* Marital status of the customer (0: unmarried, 1: married) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the customer registered */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the last purchase made by the customer */,
  "total_spend" TEXT /* Total amount spent by the customer */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points earned by the customer */,
  "referral_code" TEXT /* Referral code for the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_marital_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("marital_status_id") REFERENCES marital_statuses ("marital_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_city_category FOREIGN KEY ("city_category") REFERENCES cities ("city_category"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_occupation_id FOREIGN KEY ("occupation_id") REFERENCES occupations ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_category_1" INTEGER /* Primary category of the product */,
  "product_category_2" INTEGER /* Secondary category of the product */,
  "product_category_3" INTEGER /* Tertiary category of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Stock quantity of the product */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Average rating of the product */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_product_category_1 FOREIGN KEY ("product_category_1") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_product_category_3 FOREIGN KEY ("product_category_3") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_product_category_2 FOREIGN KEY ("product_category_2") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the transaction */,
  "product_id" TEXT /* ID of the product purchased */,
  "purchase_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the purchase */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "discount_applied" TEXT /* Discount applied to the transaction */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., paid, pending, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the product category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_category" TEXT /* Category of the city (e.g., A, B, C) */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or province where the city is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the city is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "occupations" (
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each occupation */,
  "occupation_name" TEXT /* Name of the occupation */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the occupation belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marital_statuses" (
  "marital_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marital status */,
  "marital_status_name" TEXT /* Name of the marital status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the marital status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("marital_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the age group (e.g., 0-17, 18-24) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)
